Follow `/AGENTS.md`.

Before changing modeling, evaluation, or public-facing scientific text, review:

- `/docs/CLAIMS_LADDER.md`
- `/docs/EVALUATION_PROTOCOL.md`
- `/docs/PHASE3C_TEXT_PROFILE_ALIGNMENT.md`

Never commit data, embeddings, generated model artifacts, credentials, or private paths. Synthetic checks are engineering validation, not scientific evidence. Learned model results remain pending until reviewed.
